issue.message:
Library lint checks reference invalid APIs; these checks **will be skipped**!
Lint found an issue registry (`androidx.compose.ui.lint.UiIssueRegistry`) which contains some references to invalid API: org.jetbrains.kotlin.analysis.api.resolution.KaCompoundAccessCall#getCompoundOperation(): org.jetbrains.kotlin.analysis.api.resolution.KaCompoundOperation (Referenced from androidx/compose/ui/lint/SuspiciousModifierThenDetectorKt.class)
Therefore, this lint check library is **not** included in analysis. This affects the following lint checks: `UnnecessaryComposedModifier` `LocalContextConfigurationRead` `LocalContextGetResourceValueCall` `LocalContextResourcesRead` `ConfigurationScreenWidthHeight` `NonObservableLocale` `ModifierFactoryExtensionFunction` `ModifierFactoryReturnType` `ModifierFactoryUnreferencedReceiver` `ModifierNodeInspectableProperties` `ModifierParameter` `MultipleAwaitPointerEventScopes` `ReturnFromAwaitPointerEventScope` `SuspiciousCompositionLocalModifierRead` `SuspiciousModifierThen`
To use this lint check, upgrade to a more recent version of the library.
Implicitly using the default locale is a common source of bugs: Use `String.format(Locale, ...)` instead
issue.errorLine1: sb.appendLine(" • ✅ 当前显示: $visibleCount (${String.format("%.1f", visibleCount * 100.0 / totalApps)}%)")

To get local formatting use `getDateInstance()`, `getDateTimeInstance()`, or `getTimeInstance()`, or use `new SimpleDateFormat(String template, Locale locale)` with for example `Locale.US` for ASCII dates.
issue.errorLine1: changes = if (changes.isEmpty()) listOf(FieldChange("更新", "编辑于", java.text.SimpleDateFormat("HH:mm").format(java.util.Date()))) else changes

<string name="quick_database_maintenance_target_selector_hint">Only applies in "Sync into selected database" mode.</string>
<string name="quick_database_maintenance_plan_desc">This run will process %1$d groups and detected %2$d conflict candidates. Continue with default merge rules?</string>
<string name="quick_database_maintenance_operation_desc">Shows what the merge engine is doing in real time.</string>
<string name="quick_database_maintenance_conflict_summary">Password conflicts handled as multi-password: %1$d, field conflicts auto-merged: %2$d</string>
<string name="quick_database_maintenance_stats_desc">%1$d connected databases, max %2$d items, min %3$d items.</string>
<string name="quick_database_maintenance_diff_desc">Like a code diff: each card shows what this database has while other databases still miss.</string>
<string name="quick_database_maintenance_diff_count">%1$d extra entries detected in this database</string>
<string name="quick_database_maintenance_summary_line">Processed %1$d matched groups, updated %2$d items, created %3$d items, skipped %4$d groups</string>
<string name="quick_database_maintenance_note_passwords_empty">No cross-database password mirrors are currently eligible for automatic alignment.</string>
<string name="quick_database_maintenance_note_passwords_scope">Only password mirrors already recognized as the same account are synchronized.</string>
<string name="quick_database_maintenance_note_authenticators_empty">No authenticator mirrors are currently eligible for automatic alignment.</string>
<string name="quick_database_maintenance_note_authenticators_scope">Authenticators are aligned by issuer, account name, and secret.</string>
<string name="quick_database_maintenance_note_bank_cards_empty">No card-pack mirrors (bank cards or documents) are currently eligible for automatic alignment.</string>
<string name="quick_database_maintenance_note_bank_cards_scope">Card pack entries are aligned by card/document key fields and title.</string>
<string name="quick_database_maintenance_note_passkeys_scan_only">Passkeys are scan-only for now. They are not auto-copied across databases to avoid breaking private key integrity.</string>
<string name="quick_database_maintenance_error_load_sources">Failed to load the connected database list.</string>
<string name="quick_database_maintenance_error_no_categories">Select at least one data type before running sync merge.</string>
<string name="quick_database_maintenance_error_no_target">Select a target database before running target sync.</string>
<string name="quick_database_maintenance_error_run">Quick database maintenance failed. Try again after checking the connected databases.</string>
<string name="dedup_engine_desc">Scan Monica, KeePass, and Bitwarden data with rule-based duplicate governance</string>
<string name="dedup_engine_entry_desc">Review exact duplicates, cross-source mirrors, and type-level conflicts in one place</string>
<string name="dedup_engine_overview_desc">See the current duplicate landscape first, lock the strategy, and then clear clusters with less noise.</string>
<string name="dedup_engine_strategy_desc">Set the primary database first, then narrow the review scope and issue focus.</string>
<string name="dedup_engine_radar_desc">Use this layer to jump straight into one conflict shape when the list gets dense.</string>
<string name="dedup_engine_worklist_desc">%1$d clusters are waiting for review in the current view</string>
<string name="dedup_engine_preferred_source_desc">Tell Monica which database you trust most. Duplicate suggestions will prefer keeping it and then handling other password copies.</string>
<string name="dedup_engine_controls_desc">Keep the page compact by putting the primary database, scope, and issue type in one control card.</string>
<string name="dedup_engine_controls_scope_desc">Limit the source range you are reviewing right now.</string>
<string name="dedup_engine_controls_type_desc">Focus on a single duplicate type here when needed.</string>
<string name="dedup_engine_specific_source_desc">If this source has multiple databases, choose which one should be kept first.</string>
<string name="dedup_engine_specific_scope_desc">If this source has multiple databases, narrow the current review to one of them.</string>
<string name="dedup_engine_batch_no_common_action">The current selection does not share a safe batch action yet.</string>
<string name="dedup_engine_empty_desc">This scope currently looks clean, or the remaining items were intentionally ignored.</string>
<string name="dedup_action_keep_one_local_item">Keep 1 Monica item and trash the rest</string>
<string name="dedup_cluster_exact_password_desc">Same source, same account, same password. Suitable for cleanup inside %1$s.</string>
<string name="dedup_cluster_cross_source_password_desc">The same account appears across %1$s. Prefer governance instead of direct deletion.</string>
<string name="dedup_cluster_exact_password_recommendation">Exact password duplicates were found in the same source. Keep 1 %1$s record and archive the rest.</string>

<string name="dedup_cluster_cross_source_password_recommendation">This account exists across multiple databases. Based on the current preference, keep %1$s as the primary record and archive the other password copies.</string>
<string name="dedup_cluster_cross_source_password_fallback">There is no %1$s record in this cluster. Keep %2$s as the primary record and archive the other password copies.</string>
<string name="dedup_cluster_totp_desc">Authenticator secrets or issuer/account pairs overlap across %1$s.</string>
<string name="dedup_cluster_bank_card_desc">The same card fingerprint appears across %1$s.</string>
<string name="dedup_cluster_document_desc">The same document number appears across %1$s.</string>
<string name="dedup_cluster_passkey_desc">Multiple passkeys are bound to the same site account in %1$s. Review before deleting anything.</string>
<string name="import_data_keepass_legacy_kdb_unsupported">Legacy .kdb (KeePass 1.x) is not supported. Please convert it to .kdbx in KeePassDX or KeePassXC first.</string>
<string name="import_data_keepass_tip_legacy_kdb">Open this file in KeePassDX or KeePassXC and save it as .kdbx, then import again.</string>
<string name="import_data_keepass_tip_invalid_credential">Check password/key file combination, and ensure key file format matches the database origin (XML/HEX/RAW).</string>
<string name="import_data_keepass_tip_permission">Re-select the database or key file and grant read permission again.</string>
<string name="import_data_keepass_tip_kdf_memory">Database KDF memory settings are too high for this device. Lower Argon2 memory/parallelism and retry.</string>
<string name="import_data_keepass_tip_format_unsupported">The file format or cipher is not supported, or the file is corrupted. Verify with KeePassDX/KeePassXC first.</string>
<string name="import_data_keepass_tip_io_failed">I/O failed while reading the file. Check file integrity and storage availability, then retry.</string>
<string name="import_type_steam_coexist_desc">Paste your device ID and SteamGuard JSON for coexist import.</string>
<string name="import_type_steam_login_desc">Sign in with your Steam account, then complete verification code when prompted.</string>
<string name="import_type_steam_guard_json_hint">Paste full JSON containing shared_secret and serial_number</string>
<string name="import_type_steam_custom_name_hint">Leave empty to use account_name from JSON</string>
<string name="webdav_restore_local_only_dedup_desc">Off: keep old behavior (global dedup across all data). On: only dedup with local entries.</string>
<string name="webdav_restore_mode_global_dedup_desc">May treat KeePass / Bitwarden items as duplicates.</string>
<string name="webdav_restore_mode_local_safe_desc">Default: only deduplicate against Monica local data.</string>
<string name="webdav_restore_mode_replace_warning">KeePass / Bitwarden data will not be changed.</string>
<string name="keepass_webdav_conflict_mode_auto_desc">KeePassDX-like behavior: use conditional write when possible, otherwise best-effort save.</string>
<string name="keepass_webdav_conflict_mode_strict_desc">Require server-side conflict metadata; safer but may block writes on some WebDAV servers.</string>
<string name="keepass_webdav_conflict_protection_enabled_hint">Strict mode: blocks writes if ETag is missing or the remote file changed.</string>
<string name="keepass_webdav_conflict_protection_disabled_hint">Auto mode (recommended): uses If-Match when ETag exists; otherwise falls back to best-effort overwrite.</string>
<string name="keepass_webdav_create_message">Create an empty KeePass database on your WebDAV server.</string>
<string name="keepass_webdav_create_exists">A database with the same name already exists</string>
<string name="keepass_webdav_attach_hint">Select a remote .kdbx file below to attach for direct read/write.</string>
<string name="keepass_webdav_force_overwrite_message">This will force-push local data to WebDAV and overwrite the remote file. Remote changes not in local data will be lost.</string>
<string name="keepass_webdav_force_overwrite_not_attached">This remote database is not attached yet</string>
<string name="keepass_webdav_removed">KeePass WebDAV has been removed. Please use local KeePass database management.</string>
<string name="password_list_customization_subtitle">Customize top quick filters in the password list</string>
<string name="password_list_preview_desc">Preview reflects currently enabled top modules and their order.</string>
<string name="password_list_preview_empty">No top modules enabled. Turn on at least one item below.</string>

<string name="password_list_quick_filters_switch_desc">Show quick filter chips at the top of the password list for Favorites, 2FA, Notes, Uncategorized, Local only, Manual stack only, Never stack, and Unstacked.</string>
<string name="password_list_quick_filters_content_desc">Toggle each quick filter item and drag to reorder.</string>
<string name="password_list_quick_folders_switch_desc">Show quick folder cards at the top of the password list to jump to parent or child folders.</string>
<string name="password_list_quick_folder_path_banner_switch_desc">Show a folder path banner above the password list. Works independently from quick folder cards.</string>
<string name="category_selection_ui_mode_desc">Choose which UI style is used when opening category selection in the password list.</string>
<string name="category_selection_ui_mode_chip_menu_desc">Open an anchored chip menu beside the top pill, with databases on the first row and category folders below.</string>
<string name="password_list_quick_access_switch_desc">Show a quick-entry button above Add FAB for recently opened and frequently opened passwords.</string>
<string name="password_card_adjust_subtitle">Redesign display and grouping for password cards</string>
<string name="icon_settings_subtitle">Configure icon visibility for Password, Authenticator and Passkey pages</string>
<string name="icon_settings_master_desc">Turn this off to hide all card icons. Keep it on to apply page-specific switches below.</string>
<string name="icon_settings_page_switches_desc">Configure icon visibility for each page independently.</string>
<string name="icon_settings_unmatched_strategy_desc">When no icon source matches, choose how cards should render the icon area.</string>
<string name="icon_settings_priority_desc">The resolver checks from top to bottom and stops at the first matched source.</string>
<string name="icon_settings_priority_unified">Custom Simple Icon > Custom Uploaded Icon > Auto-matched Simple Icon > Website favicon > App icon > Default icon</string>
<string name="icon_settings_priority_password">Custom Simple Icon > Custom Uploaded Icon > Auto-matched Simple Icon > Website favicon > App icon > Default icon</string>
<string name="icon_settings_priority_authenticator">Custom Simple Icon > Custom Uploaded Icon > Auto-matched Simple Icon > Website favicon > App icon > Default icon</string>

<string name="icon_settings_priority_passkey">Custom Simple Icon (bound password) > Custom Uploaded Icon (bound password) > Auto-matched Simple Icon > Website favicon > Bound app icon > Default icon</string>
<string name="icon_settings_source_line_1">This project packages icon assets from Stratum Auth app (v1.4.0, GPL-3.0): https://github.com/stratumauth/app/releases/tag/v1.4.0</string>
<string name="icon_settings_source_line_3">Brand names and logos are trademarks of their respective owners.</string>
<string name="password_card_display_field_desc">Title is always displayed. You can customize and reorder up to 3 extra lines.</string>
<string name="password_card_field_limit_hint">Only the first 3 selected fields are shown on cards.</string>
<string name="password_card_show_authenticator_desc">If this password has a bound authenticator, show code and countdown on the card. This item is fixed and not reorderable.</string>
<string name="password_card_hide_other_content_when_authenticator_title">Hide other content when authenticator is shown</string>

<string name="password_card_hide_other_content_when_authenticator_desc">If a password has a bound authenticator, only show title and authenticator info on the card, and hide other display fields.</string>
<string name="authenticator_card_display_field_desc">Title is always displayed. You can customize and reorder up to 2 extra lines.</string>
<string name="authenticator_card_field_limit_hint">Only the first 2 selected fields are shown on cards.</string>
<string name="password_quick_access_desc">Open passwords you use most without searching.</string>
<string name="autofill_v2_engine_desc">Autofill is now handled by a rebuilt Bitwarden-style engine. Legacy chain is frozen.</string>
<string name="autofill_v2_enable_service_desc">Turn Monica autofill on or off at app level.</string>
<string name="autofill_v2_strict_match_desc">Only allow high-confidence package/domain matches to reduce false fill.</string>
<string name="autofill_v2_subdomain_match_desc">Treat subdomains of the same site as related login targets.</string>
<string name="autofill_v2_respect_off_desc">Skip fields where apps/websites explicitly disable autofill.</string>
<string name="autofill_v2_save_prompt_desc">Offer to save new credentials after login/register.</string>
<string name="autofill_v2_blacklist_desc">Block autofill in sensitive apps (%1$d packages).</string>
<string name="autofill_blocked_fields_dialog_desc">These fields were marked as not suitable for autofill. Remove an item to allow autofill again.</string>
<string name="autofill_blocked_fields_empty">No fields have been marked yet.</string>
<string name="autofill_v2_set_system_service">Set Monica as system autofill service</string>
<string name="autofill_v2_set_system_service_desc">Open Android system settings and set Monica as your autofill provider.</string>
<string name="autofill_v2_freeze_notice">Legacy autofill and its old settings are frozen. New behavior is controlled only by this V2 page.</string>
<string name="autofill_v2_default_scope_desc">Set which storage source Monica shows by default when autofill list opens.</string>
<string name="autofill_v2_default_keepass_desc">Limit default suggestions and list items to one KeePass database.</string>
<string name="autofill_v2_default_bitwarden_desc">Limit default suggestions and list items to one Bitwarden vault.</string>
